decision: Use sync psycopg2 engine for M1 diagnostic (read-only). Host: jip-data-engine.ctay2iewomaj.ap-south-1.rds.amazonaws.com, DB: data_engine, User: jip_admin, Region: ap-south-1, SSL: verify-full with AWS RDS CA bundle. Password from JIP_DB_PASSWORD env var at runtime.
All de_* tables live in public schema. PRD candidates (data_engine, fie_v3, jip) do not exist as schemas. intelligence schema created for new platform tables.
No NIFTY MICROCAP 250 index in data. Stock universe = NIFTY 500 (500) + top 250 by 60-day median traded value. Per PRD Section 8.6 fallback.
de_mf_master lacks plan/option columns. Adapted: filter by fund_name pattern (contains Gr/Growth, excludes Direct/IDCW). Yields 654 schemes vs PRD est. of 400.
de_global_prices contains Indian ETF prices (GOLDBEES, NIFTYBEES, etc), NOT international benchmarks. S&P 500 and MSCI World are MISSING — need yfinance ingest in M2.

detail: Tier 1/2/4 100% pass. Tier 3 98.33% with 2 NUMERIC(18,4) precision artifacts (Flat vs Deteriorating at boundary) accepted for M2 sign-off. Three validation methodology bugs fixed (sampler bar_seq filter, EMA lookback bound, rolling max_drawdown formula). _log_run() schema mismatch fixed. JIP data quality issues (IDFCFIRSTB close=10010) documented. Next: 3 consecutive nightly runs (Tier 5) starting 2026-05-08.

decision: ema_10_ratio / ema_20_ratio precision deferred to M3
detail: Stored as NUMERIC(18,4). Two stocks had ratios differing only at 5th decimal during compute, producing correct 'Deteriorating' classification. On readback both ratios round to same 4-decimal value, so hand validator sees 'Flat'. Fix: migrate to NUMERIC(18,8) at M3 threshold calibration review.
